quotes.text: Can one conversation change the world?
There's still so much for us to dream and do.
It can also produce ideas that transform how people live their lives.
Google's approach is to foster creativity and cooperation in the pursuit of a common goal: creating the world's best search service .
Quick and direct access to information can deliver news from abroad, encourage a child's curiosity, and reunite long-lost friends.
Can one conversation change the world?
There's still so much for us to dream and do.
It can also produce ideas that transform how people live their lives.

And whether you work at our headquarters in Mountain View, California, or in any of our locations around the world, we think you'll find Google a place where you can aspire to outsized accomplishments.
Quick and direct access to information can deliver news from abroad, encourage a child's curiosity, and reunite long-lost friends.
Can one conversation change the world?
There's still so much for us to dream and do.
It can also produce ideas that transform how people live their lives.
Googlers are bright, passionate people with diverse backgrounds, coming together to create a unique culture.

And whether you work at our headquarters in Mountain View, California, or in any of our locations around the world, we think you'll find Google a place where you can aspire to outsized accomplishments.
At Google, we've designed a culture that helps you get there.
quotes.heading: Let's work together.

quotes.text: At Google, our strategy is simple: we hire great people and encourage them to make their dreams a reality.
quotes.heading: Search openings

quotes.text: What's it like to work at Google?
quotes.heading: Let's work together.

quotes.text: From our flexible, project-based approach to corporate structure to our innovative perks and benefits, we do everything we can to make sure our employees not only have great jobs, but great lives.
quotes.heading: Let's work together.

quotes.text: Chances are you have a good idea of where you want to go in life.
quotes.heading: Let's work together.

quotes.text: Googlers relish the freedom to create the next generation of web technologies in an environment designed to foster collaboration, creativity, health, and happiness.
quotes.heading: Let’s work together.

quotes.text: In every Google office, you will find challenging projects and smart people with potential to change the world.
quotes.heading: Let’s work together.

quotes.text: At Google, we understand that our worldwide success results from our globally diverse workforce.
quotes.heading: Let’s work together.

quotes.text: What’s it like to work at Google ?
quotes.heading: Let’s work together.

quotes.text: At Google, our world is flat.
quotes.heading: Do more. A lot more.

quotes.text: When everyone in the company is reaching out, not up, good ideas can go a lot farther.
quotes.heading: Do more. A lot more.

quotes.text: At Google, innovation and creativity keeps our projects changing and improving.
quotes.heading: Let’s work together.

quotes.text: Our consistency comes from our Googlers – smart, amazing people who foster an environment of collaboration and fun.
quotes.heading: Let’s work together.

quotes.text: Our hope is to bring the power of search to previously unexplored areas, and to help people access and use even more of the ever-expanding information in their lives.
quotes.heading: Ten things we know to be true

quotes.text: And our researchers continue looking into ways to bring all the world’s information to people seeking answers.
quotes.heading: Ten things we know to be true

quotes.text: Those are the kinds of changes we seek to make, and we’re always looking for new places where we can make a difference.
quotes.heading: Ten things we know to be true

quotes.text: The web has evolved enormously since Google first appeared on the scene, but one thing that hasn't changed is our belief in the endless possibilities of the Internet itself.
quotes.heading: What we do for the web

quotes.text: We build products that we hope will make the web better—and therefore your experience on the web better.
quotes.heading: What we do for the web

quotes.text: At Google, we don’t just accept difference - we celebrate it, we support it, and we thrive on it for the benefit of our employees, our products and our community.
quotes.heading: Life at Google

quotes.text: From our history and culture, to the people behind our products, get the inside scoop on all things Googley.
quotes.heading: Life at Google

quotes.text: Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer.
quotes.heading: Life at Google

quotes.text: Get to know who we are - from the inside out.
quotes.heading: Life at Google

quotes.text: Take me to Life at Google Still a student?
quotes.heading: Life at Google

quotes.text: At Google, we believe in making the world a better place through technology.
quotes.heading: Global Impact Awards: Giving back at Google scale

quotes.text: At Google, our mission is to organize the world’s information and make it universally accessible. ...
quotes.heading: Google: A great workplace for women

quotes.text: Our engineers use technology to solve some of the world’s biggest challenges.
quotes.heading: Innovation at Google

quotes.text: We’ve always wanted Google to be a place that brought together smart, talented people from a diversity of backgrounds, and where you could bring your whole self to work.
quotes.heading: Culture and Diversity

quotes.text: We want people to feel good about using Google products.
quotes.heading: Going green for good

quotes.text: Whether it’s creating self-driving cars or translating the web into 64 languages, we love big bets.
quotes.heading: Thinking big: Larry Page talks moon shots

quotes.text: This perspective is not limited to our engineering teams and technical roles, but extends to all Googlers who share a desire to challenge what’s possible.
quotes.heading: Thinking big: Larry Page talks moon shots

quotes.text: Our company culture encourages experimentation and the free flow of ideas.
quotes.heading: Thinking big: Larry Page talks moon shots

quotes.text: We value giving back to the community just as much as we value the products we create.
quotes.heading: Give back

quotes.text: We match Googlers’ charitable donations and add donations for hours Googlers work as volunteers.
quotes.heading: Give back

quotes.text: We’re cultivating the next generation of technologists through computer science education.
quotes.heading: Education

quotes.text: And while progress will take time, our actions today will determine who we are in the future.
quotes.heading: Building a Google that works for everyone

quotes.text: Google should be a place where people from different backgrounds and experiences come to do their best work–a place where every Googler feels they belong.
quotes.heading: Building a Google that works for everyone

quotes.text: These commitments require us to look at bias through a wider lens: at Google, in the industry, and in society.
quotes.heading: Building a Google that works for everyone

quotes.text: We’re still not where we want to be when it comes to diversity, but last year, we made progress in our efforts to build a more diverse Google.
quotes.heading: In 2015, we moved in the right direction.

quotes.text: Make people's lives better through technology.
quotes.heading: Find your team

quotes.text: Develop the products and tools of the future for billions of users.
quotes.heading: Find your team

quotes.text: Together, we create access to information and build products for everyone.
quotes.heading: Find your team

quotes.text: Large or small, each one of our offices is designed to inspire innovation, big ideas, and community.
quotes.heading: Our locations

quotes.text: Find, grow, and support the people who make Google great.
quotes.heading: Find your team

quotes.text: Whether it's business or engineering & technology, we're here to help get you to your future.
quotes.heading: Build your future with Google

quotes.text: We’re applying Google’s innovation, research, and resources to promote progress and expand opportunity for everyone.
quotes.heading: Accelerating the impact of nonprofits

quotes.text: We're committed to creating tools that make it easier for everyone to accomplish important everyday tasks - like having conversations, getting work done, and enjoying entertainment.
quotes.heading: Android & Pixel for everyone

quotes.text: Beyond screening and monitoring, we’re researching ways that AI can support and inform the treatment of breast cancer and other diseases across the globe.
quotes.heading: AI in Mammography

quotes.text: Working with the disability community to build more helpful phones for all
quotes.heading: We’re building technology that helps each person reach their full potential.

quotes.text: Here are some of the ways we’re doing it: In 2022, we announced the 1,000 Languages Initiative , an ambitious commitment to build an AI model that will support the 1,000 most spoken languages and bring greater inclusion to billions of people in marginalized communities all around the world.
quotes.heading: Accessibility with AI
